sessions.summary: Fixed globalThis property resolution for Window & typeof globalThis intersection types
sessions.invariant: When resolving properties on intersection types like Window & typeof globalThis, tsz should check properties from ALL intersection members (Window interface first), not just shortcut to globalThis property resolution

sessions.summary: Fixed parameter type extraction from overloaded generic callables
sessions.invariant: When extracting parameter types for contextual typing from callable types with multiple generic signatures, tsz should collect parameter types from ALL signatures and return the common type if they agree, rather than returning None early
sessions.kpi_impact: Big3 wrong-code reduced from 71 to 69 (2 tests improved), overall 11744/12581 (93.3%)

sessions.blocked_on: Complex big3 issues require deeper investigation: generic defaults, CommonJS require resolution, and type predicate narrowing

sessions.summary: Partial fix: Apply default type arguments for generic interfaces with all-default params
sessions.invariant: When an interface with all-default type parameters (e.g., ExtensionConfig<Options = any>) is referenced without type arguments, tsz should create an Application type with default arguments instead of just a Lazy type
sessions.kpi_impact: +1 test passing (11746 -> 11747), establishes correct pattern for default type param application
sessions.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite

known_dead_ends: Analyzed 4 representative tests: chainedPrototypeAssignment (require resolution), genericDefaults (default type params), strictSubtypeAndNarrowing (type predicates), assignmentToVoidZero1 (flow analysis)
promising_leads: assignmentToVoidZero1.ts is close-to-passing (diff=1) with missing TS2322 - flow analysis issue
genericDefaults.ts has extra TS2345 from generic default handling

promising_leads.summary: Added support for strictBuiltinIteratorReturn compiler option in conformance runner
promising_leads.invariant: The conformance test runner must properly pass the strictBuiltinIteratorReturn option to enable iterator return type checking for tests that use this directive
tests_fixed: iterableTReturnTNext.ts and related iterator tests (3 improvements)
promising_leads.kpi_impact: +3 tests passing, Big3 wrong-code count maintained at 68
promising_leads.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite
